title: If Else Logic
description: Control the execution flow of your code based on a boolean condition using if and else statements.
problemStatement:
Age check! Write an `if-else` statement that checks if the variable `age` (set to `20`) is greater than or equal to `18`. Print `"Adult"` if true, and `"Minor"` otherwise.

**Requirement:** Use the standard bracket `{}` syntax for your blocks.
hints: Conditions in Swift don't require parentheses, but the curly braces are mandatory.
